Application
Profile

A budding designer bridging the gap between physical substance and digital interface. Inspired by the Bauhaus ethos and a life motto of Anticipate and Adapt, I leverage my background in Science and competitive Silambam to bring analytical rigor to the creative process. I specialise in sustainable 3D modeling and UI/UX, driven by a love for curiosity-led learning and a high ability to handle critique. I seek to solve global challenges through strategic, storytelling-driven design.

Core Competencies
Anticipate & Adapt Strategic Storytelling Critical Thinking Problem-Solving Analytical Rigor Resilient Under Critique Curiosity-led Learning
Experience & Achievements
Athletics · Grade 10–12
National Level Silambam Athlete
2022 – 2025 · National Level

Competed across three consecutive years at national level, earning 2 Gold and 3 Bronze medals. High-performance martial arts training built acute mental focus, physical coordination, and the resilience to iterate and perform under extreme pressure — all qualities I now bring directly into the design process.

UI/UX · 3D · Product
Self-Taught Designer
2023 – Present · Independent

Intensive self-directed study across Bauhaus principles, sustainable product systems, and modern UI/UX workflows. Built hands-on proficiency in Figma, Framer, Blender, and Rhino. A practice grounded equally in analytical method and visual craft — with a strong focus on functional, human-centred, and sustainable design systems.
